heading: Termination of limited appointments
label: 4011 Termination of limited appointments
text: Except as provided in , the Secretary may terminate at any time the appointment of any member of the Service serving under a limited appointment who is in the Senior Foreign Service, who is assigned to a salary class in the Foreign Service Schedule or who is paid in accordance with or is a United States citizen paid under a compensation plan under .section 4010(a)(2) of this titlesection 3967 of this titlesection 3968 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 613 and is classified to .section 612 of Pub. L. 96–465section 4012 of this title

Amendments1994—, substituted “or who is paid in accordance with or is a United States citizen paid under a compensation plan under .” for “, or who is a family member of a Government employee serving under a local compensation plan established under .”Pub.
